case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. BONNIE SUNG et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED APR-16-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG, BONNIE
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG, BONNIE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-02-2013
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG, BONNIE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $290.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG, BONNIE
AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNG, BONNIE $5,517.68 PRINCIPAL, $904.49 INTEREST, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,712.17, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
